meaning: vt.使晕倒,使惊吓,打晕n.晕眩,打昏,惊倒
examples: A guard zapped him with the stun gun.
Princessfish are a species of coral-reef fish that are captured alive by divers who first stun the individual fish by squirting a certain poison at them.
This speech seemed to stun the King.
They want the perk, a lot of people want the iPhone or the Stun Gun.
He always has that potential for a breakaway and to stun all the riders around.
